word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Total revenue reached $8,333,861 with 33,196 units sold. North region led with $2,951,623 revenue. 10 statistically significant anomalies detected across sales data.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: 10 anomalies documented with month/region/product/value/z-score details including: South Product_E Aug ($20,000, z=-2.89), South Product_B Mar (95 units, z=-2.59), West Product_A Nov ($54,884, z=+2.53), North Product_A Nov ($54,202, z=+2.43), and 7 additional outliers with z-scores beyond ±2.0
recommendations: Investigate South Product_E August revenue dip ($20,000, z=-2.89) for regional market issues
Audit South Product_B March unit sales (95 units, z=-2.59) for supply chain disruptions
Scale North/West Product_A November performance ($54k-$55k, z=+2.3-2.5) through targeted marketing
Verify data accuracy for West Product_A September ($53,027, z=+2.25) and November ($54,884, z=+2.53) spikes
